title: NORTH PORTLAND DROP-IN CENTER - 211info
text: NORTH PORTLAND DROP-IN CENTER NORTH PORTLAND DROP-IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a homeless drop-in center providing showers, temporary mail services, prepackaged food that can be eaten at the center or taken to go, and case management services. 9000 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Age 18 and older experiencing or at risk of homelessness. Pets allowed. Hours: Drop-in Center: Monday-Friday 9am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-5pm Showers: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm Email (503) 545-3499 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 545-3499 Main phone Main phone (503) 545-3499 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Neighborhoods of Arbor Lodge, Kenton, Portsmouth, St. Johns, and University Park within zip codes 97203 and 97217 Services: Homeless Drop In Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
